programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Do You Have a Secret Baby?; Truth: $1400 Is Missing!
programme.desc: Random women are calling Eve about her boyfriend, Michael, and she suspects he's cheating, but Michael insists he's been honest throughout the relationship -- with trust on the line, everything hangs in the balance as Karamo unlocks the phones; Brandi says $1,400 went missing and she believes her cousin, Damyjai, took it; Damyjai swears she has no reason to steal any money and wants to clear her name. A bond is now broken, but can it be restored? It's a case of whodunit on today's "Karamo"!

programme.desc: After providing a home for her grandchildren while her son was in prison, a woman's relationship with her family falls apart after he and his fiancé move in.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Blocked From Grandma's Funeral; Unlock: You Broke My Heart ... Should I Break Our Lease?
programme.desc: Shannon and her cousin Sarah were inseparable until their grandmother passed away; then, Shannon says, Sarah turned the entire family against her -- but Sarah tells a different story, insisting that the family has gone above and beyond to support Shannon; Jada and Michael are struggling to move on while still living under the same roof -- Jada isn't ready to let go, and she wants Michael's phone unlocked to get the truth.
